hasSuggestion.description: True when the response proposes an updated DOT source for user review. False when answering without a DOT edit suggestion.

response.description: A concise Japanese response. For suggestions, summarize the DOT changes. For no-suggestion replies, answer the user's question.

output.description: The complete updated DOT source for suggestions. If hasSuggestion is false, return the unchanged current DOT source.
